title: Anandham Vilayadum Veedu
desc: Muthupandi and Kaasi, two half-brothers, lead harmonious lives with their large families. However, the evil scheme of an old nemesis threatens their formidable unity.

title: Dikkiloona
desc: Mani, an electricity board lineman, discovers a group of scientists working on a time machine. Seizing the opportunity, he uses it to rewrite his unpleasant past and change his life.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Arjun
desc: Arjun, a spoilt young man, is jealous of his neighbour, Anu, as she gets doted on by everyone around him. He finds out that she wishes to move abroad for higher education and decides to ruin her plan.

title: Pattathu Yaanai
desc: A man and his friends move to Trichy to set up a restaurant business. However, their plans get interrupted when he gets involved with the same girl that a gangster loves.

title: Dabangg 3
desc: Chulbul Pandey, a corrupt police officer, leads a happy life with his wife and family. However, when his past enemy returns to wreak havoc, he must protect his loved ones from harm.

title: Free Ticket
desc: A comprehensive compilation of songs and snippets from some of the most popular and trending Tamil movies is played to entertain the audience.

title: Iru Mugan
desc: Love invents a lethal drug and gives it to terrorist outfits, who use it to kill Indian officials in Kuala Lumpur. When RAW officers find a love emblem tattoo on his neck, they start investigating.

title: Cocktail
desc: Ravi Abraham, a successful architect, leads a happy life with his wife Parvathy and daughter Ammu. Their lives go topsy-turvy when a stranger named Venketesh asks for a lift in Ravi's car.

title: Haraa
desc: Ram shares a close bond with his daughter, Nimisha. However, when he hears the news of her death, he strives to find out the truth.

title: Madha Yaanai Koottam
desc: Parthiban, the son of a powerful late patriarch, accidentally kills the son of Veera Thevar, while trying to save his stepbrother. Veera then decides to avenge his son's death by murdering Parthiban.

title: Rathnam
desc: Rathnam, a henchman for MLA Panner Selvam, rescues a girl from attackers during her interview trip to Vellore. As he becomes her protector, he wonders how long he can keep her safe.

title: Kanni Raasi
desc: Gemini, a young man, is averse to love and relationships. However, when Anjali, a teacher, moves in next door, she falls for him and tries to change his mind.

title: Kiss
desc: Nelson gets a magical power after reading a mysterious book. Soon, he goes in search of the person who gave him the book, eventually leading him to discover his own fate.

title: Mark Antony
desc: Mark, the son of a former gangster, comes across a telephone that can contact people in the past.
